# dignity

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/dignity"
```

Package dignity evaluates essential dignities \(domicile, exaltation, detriment, fall\), mutual receptions, and sect status for planets.

CalcDignity and CalcChartDignities assess individual and chart\-wide dignities. FindMutualReceptions detects planets in each other's signs. CalcSect determines whether a planet is in its preferred sect \(diurnal or nocturnal\) based on the chart's day/night status.

<a name="BonMalCondition"></a>
## type [BonMalCondition](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/bonmal.go#L10>)

BonMalCondition represents a bonification or maltreatment condition

```go
type BonMalCondition string
```

<a name="CondBeneficTrine"></a>

```go
const (
    CondBeneficTrine       BonMalCondition = "BENEFIC_TRINE"
    CondBeneficSextile     BonMalCondition = "BENEFIC_SEXTILE"
    CondBeneficConjunction BonMalCondition = "BENEFIC_CONJUNCTION"
    CondInBeneficSign      BonMalCondition = "IN_BENEFIC_SIGN"
    CondMaleficSquare      BonMalCondition = "MALEFIC_SQUARE"
    CondMaleficOpposition  BonMalCondition = "MALEFIC_OPPOSITION"
    CondMaleficConjunction BonMalCondition = "MALEFIC_CONJUNCTION"
    CondInMaleficSign      BonMalCondition = "IN_MALEFIC_SIGN"
    CondCombust            BonMalCondition = "COMBUST"
    CondUnderSunbeams      BonMalCondition = "UNDER_SUNBEAMS"
    CondBesieged           BonMalCondition = "BESIEGED"
)
```

<a name="BonMalDetail"></a>
## type [BonMalDetail](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/bonmal.go#L35-L39>)

BonMalDetail holds one bonification or maltreatment condition

```go
type BonMalDetail struct {
    Condition BonMalCondition `json:"condition"`
    Source    models.PlanetID `json:"source,omitempty"` // The planet causing it
    Score     int             `json:"score"`
}
```

<a name="BonMalInfo"></a>
## type [BonMalInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/bonmal.go#L27-L32>)

BonMalInfo holds the bonification and maltreatment analysis for a planet

```go
type BonMalInfo struct {
    PlanetID      models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id"`
    Bonifications []BonMalDetail  `json:"bonifications"`
    Maltreatments []BonMalDetail  `json:"maltreatments"`
    NetScore      int             `json:"net_score"` // positive = bonified, negative = maltreated
}
```

```go
func CalcBonMal(target models.PlanetID, positions []models.PlanetPosition) BonMalInfo
```

### func [CalcChartBonMal](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/bonmal.go#L270>)

```go
func CalcChartBonMal(positions []models.PlanetPosition) []BonMalInfo
```

<a name="Dignity"></a>
## type [Dignity](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/dignity.go#L8>)

Dignity represents an essential dignity type

```go
type Dignity string
```

<a name="Rulership"></a>

```go
const (
    Rulership  Dignity = "RULERSHIP"
    Exaltation Dignity = "EXALTATION"
    Detriment  Dignity = "DETRIMENT"
    Fall       Dignity = "FALL"
)
```

<a name="DignityInfo"></a>
## type [DignityInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/dignity.go#L18-L27>)

DignityInfo holds the essential dignity analysis for a planet

```go
type DignityInfo struct {
    PlanetID    models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id"`
    Sign        string          `json:"sign"`
    Dignities   []Dignity       `json:"dignities,omitempty"`
    Score       int             `json:"score"`
    Ruler       models.PlanetID `json:"ruler"`
    Exalted     bool            `json:"exalted"`
    InDetriment bool            `json:"in_detriment"`
    InFall      bool            `json:"in_fall"`
}
```

<a name="MutualReceptionInfo"></a>
## type [MutualReceptionInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/dignity.go#L30-L36>)

MutualReceptionInfo holds mutual reception between two planets

```go
type MutualReceptionInfo struct {
    PlanetA models.PlanetID `json:"planet_a"`
    SignA   string          `json:"sign_a"`
    PlanetB models.PlanetID `json:"planet_b"`
    SignB   string          `json:"sign_b"`
    Type    string          `json:"type"` // "rulership" or "exaltation"
}
```

<a name="FindMutualReceptions"></a>
### func [FindMutualReceptions](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/dignity.go#L184>)

```go
func FindMutualReceptions(positions []models.PlanetPosition) []MutualReceptionInfo
```

FindMutualReceptions finds mutual receptions between planets A mutual reception occurs when two planets are in each other's ruling signs.

<a name="SectInfo"></a>
## type [SectInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dignity/dignity.go#L231-L235>)

Sect determines if a planet is in sect \(diurnal/nocturnal alignment\)

```go
type SectInfo struct {
    PlanetID   models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id"`
    IsDayChart bool            `json:"is_day_chart"`
    InSect     bool            `json:"in_sect"`
}
```

```go
func CalcSect(planet models.PlanetID, isDayChart bool) SectInfo
```
